headline: Inflation Readings, Cisco and AMAT Earnings, and More to Watch This Week
summary: The major indexes stretched their winning streak to six weeks, the longest since October 2024.  This week nine S&P 500 companies report results, including  Constellation Energy  on Monday,  Cisco  Systems on Wednesday, and  Applied Materials  on Thursday.  The highlight of the economic calendar is the consumer price index, released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics on Tuesday.

headline: Top US Stocks To Watch This Week: AMAT, Cisco, Nebius And Circle
summary: The US stock market closed last week at a record high, with the S&P 500 Index slowly approaching the key resistance level of 7,500.

headline: Wall Street Brunch: IPOs Headline The Week's Show
summary: Cerebras headlines a busy IPO week with surging investor demand. Applied Materials faces AI demand questions. April CPI arrives with energy prices driving inflation concerns.

headline: Earnings Volatility Watch: 10 Stocks With More Than 17% Implied Moves This Week
summary: Options markets are pricing post-earnings moves between 17.74% and 42.50% on ten small/mid caps reporting May 11-14. NIQ tops the list.
